llm_raw.summary: The ZONNIC logo is present and detected via OCR, confirming logo presence. However, there is no evidence of the required bilingual nicotine warning, 18+ icon, or risk communication text in the vision signals, which are critical regulatory requirements. Most colour, gradient, and shape-based checks require manual review due to unavailable signals.

checks_performed.detail: No nicotine warning text (English or French) detected at the top of the image via OCR. REG-01, REG-04, and REG-05 violated.
No '18+' text or icon detected via OCR or object detection. REG-02 violated.
No risk communication text detected at the bottom of the image via OCR. REG-03 and REG-04 violated.
ZONNIC text detected via OCR at (332,292)-(914,416) with 99.1% confidence — logo presence confirmed per LOGO-01.

violations.rule_text: Every marketing asset MUST include a bilingual nicotine warning statement banner at the TOP of the creative.
violations.issue: No nicotine warning statement detected at the top of the image.
violations.fix_suggestion: Add the required bilingual nicotine warning banner at the top of the creative.
violations.evidence: No OCR text matching the required English or French warning detected.

violations.rule_text: The nicotine warning banner must be positioned at the TOP of the asset. The risk communication and 18+ icon must be at the BOTTOM. This placement is consistent across all compliant examples in the guidelines.
violations.issue: No nicotine warning at the top, no risk communication or 18+ icon at the bottom.
violations.fix_suggestion: Ensure nicotine warning is at the top and risk communication plus 18+ icon are at the bottom.
violations.evidence: No relevant OCR text or icon detected at top or bottom of image.

violations.rule_text: The nicotine warning must appear in BOTH English and French on every asset. English uses 'WARNING:', French uses 'AVERTISSEMENT :'.
violations.issue: No English or French nicotine warning detected.
violations.fix_suggestion: Add both English and French nicotine warnings as required.
violations.evidence: No OCR text matching 'WARNING:' or 'AVERTISSEMENT :' detected.

violations.rule_text: The 18+ icon must be present on marketing materials to indicate age restriction.
violations.fix_suggestion: Add the required 18+ icon at the bottom of the creative.
violations.evidence: No OCR text or icon matching '18+' detected.

violations.rule_text: Every marketing asset MUST include risk communication text at the BOTTOM of the creative.
violations.issue: No risk communication text detected at the bottom of the image.
violations.fix_suggestion: Add the required risk communication text at the bottom of the creative.
violations.evidence: No OCR text matching 'This product may not be right for you. Always read and follow the label.' detected.
